posts.title: Rashida Tlaib thinks that women experiencing menstrual pain should get 12 days of paid leave.

quotedTweet.content:
🚨 RASHIDA TLAIB BRISTLES WHEN ASKED: “WOULD MEN GET THE 12 DAYS TOO?” 🚨

LindellTV's @alisonintheknow confronted @RepRashida after Democrats promoted a proposal for 12 days of paid leave for women experiencing menstrual pain.

Steinberg asked a simple question:
“Democrats think

twitter.content:
Rashida Tlaib thinks that women experiencing menstrual pain should get 12 days of paid leave.

I literally couldn’t even make this up if I tried.

She thinks men can be women, but that men shouldn’t be entitled to the 12 days of paid leave.

We’re living in a clown world!
